privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.summary: This Policy describes how Keeptrip collects, uses, retains, and protects the personal data of Explorers in the European Union, complying with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Scope and purpose
paragraphs: This Policy applies to the use of Keeptrip as a progressive web application to create and manage travel stories.
By using Keeptrip, you declare that you have read this Policy and understand how we treat your personal data.

sections.title: 2. Data Controller
paragraphs: The data controller is Keeptrip.
For privacy inquiries or to exercise your rights, you can write to privacy@keeptrip.app.

sections.title: 3. Data we collect
paragraphs: Account and authentication data: display name, email address, user identifier (UID), and profile picture provided by Google OAuth.
Service usage data: routes, cities, travel dates, descriptions, and metadata that you save in your stories.
User-uploaded content: photographs and related files stored to provide the service to you.
Minimum technical data: device, browser, and IP information necessary for security, technical delivery, and abuse prevention.
Map data: queries and coordinates necessary for rendering with Mapbox.

sections.title: 4. Purposes and legal bases (GDPR)
paragraphs: Service provision (art. 6.1.b GDPR): creating your account, displaying your trips, storing content, and syncing your data.
Security and integrity (art. 6.1.f GDPR): protecting the platform against misuse, fraud, or unauthorized access.
Legal compliance (art. 6.1.c GDPR): fulfilling legal obligations and requirements of competent authorities.
Product improvement in MVP (art. 6.1.f GDPR): maintaining service stability and technical quality without commercial profiling.

sections.title: 5. Data Processors and Third Parties
paragraphs: Firebase (Google Cloud): authentication, Firestore database, and file storage.
Mapbox: rendering and interactive map services.
We do not sell personal data or share your data for behavioral advertising during this MVP phase.
When a provider acts as a processor, Keeptrip enforces contractual data protection commitments consistent with the GDPR.

sections.title: 6. International Transfers
paragraphs: Some processing may involve transferring data outside the European Economic Area to infrastructure operated by global providers.
When applicable, Keeptrip applies adequate transfer mechanisms, such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) or other valid safeguards under the GDPR.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain your data for as long as your account remains active and is necessary to provide Keeptrip.
If you delete your account or request deletion, we will delete or anonymize your data within a reasonable timeframe, unless legally required to retain it.
Backups and technical logs may be kept temporarily for security and operational continuity.

sections.title: 8. Your rights (GDPR)
paragraphs: You can exercise the rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability when applicable.
You can also withdraw consent when the legal basis is consent, without retroactive effect.
To exercise these rights, contact privacy@keeptrip.app. We will respond within the legal deadlines.
If you believe an infringement has occurred, you can file a complaint with the competent supervisory authority in your country of residence within the EU.

sections.title: 9. Security Measures
paragraphs: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data.
No system is completely infallible; therefore, we maintain ongoing improvement and incident response processes.

sections.title: 10. Minors
paragraphs: Keeptrip is not directed at children under 16.
If we detect the processing of a minor's data without adequate legal basis, we will take steps to delete it.

sections.title: 11. Changes to this Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Policy to reflect technical, product, or legal changes.
We will publish the current version with an updated date. Continued use of the service after material changes will imply acceptance of the new version, to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: 12. Contact
paragraphs: Privacy channel: privacy@keeptrip.app.
General channel: contact@keeptrip.app.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.summary: These Terms govern access to and use of Keeptrip. By continuing to authenticate on Keeptrip, you accept this agreement.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of the agreement
paragraphs: By using Keeptrip, you confirm that you have the legal capacity to accept these Terms.
If you do not agree, you must refrain from using the service.

sections.title: 2. Description of the service
paragraphs: Keeptrip is a PWA for documenting trips through routes, dates, locations, notes, and multimedia content.
In this MVP phase, the service is offered for free and for personal use.

sections.title: 3. Account and access
paragraphs: Current access is provided via Google OAuth.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and any activities carried out under it.
We may suspend or restrict accounts if there is reasonable evidence of abusive, fraudulent use, or use contrary to these Terms.

sections.title: 4. Explorer's Content
paragraphs: You retain ownership rights over the content you upload to Keeptrip.
You grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license limited to operating, hosting, copying technically, and displaying your content within Keeptrip to provide the service.
We do not acquire the right to commercialize your content outside the operation of the service without additional legal basis.
You declare that you have the necessary rights to the content you share and that it does not infringe on third-party rights.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use and Prohibitions
paragraphs: You must use Keeptrip legally, respectfully, and in accordance with the product's purpose.
It is forbidden to post illicit, infringing, violent, discriminatory, spam, or third-party-right-violating content.
It is forbidden to attempt unauthorized access, interfere with security, automate scraping, or reverse engineer the service against applicable law.

sections.title: 6. Keeptrip's Intellectual Property
paragraphs: The Keeptrip brand, UI design, software, and distinctive elements are the property of Keeptrip or its licensors.
Except where expressly authorized, no license is granted for commercial exploitation of these assets.

sections.title: 7. AS IS Service (no warranties)
paragraphs: Keeptrip is provided 'as is' and subject to availability, without express or implied warranties regarding continuity, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.
We do not guarantee a complete absence of errors, interruptions, or temporary unavailability.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Keeptrip shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, punitive, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.
Nothing in these terms excludes liability where such exclusion is prohibited by applicable law.

sections.title: 9. Suspensions and Termination
paragraphs: You may stop using Keeptrip at any time.
We may suspend, limit, or terminate access for serious breaches, legal obligations, or security risks.
We may modify, pause, or discontinue MVP features, providing reasonable notice where possible.

sections.title: 10. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
paragraphs: These Terms are interpreted under applicable consumer and data protection laws in the EU for our MVP launch.
Any dispute will be resolved before the competent jurisdiction compliant with the consumer's domicile when the law requires.

sections.title: 11. Changes to Terms
paragraphs: We may update these terms to adapt them to technical, legal, or product model changes.
We will publish the current version along with its updated date.

sections.title: 12. Contact
paragraphs: Legal inquiries: legal@keeptrip.app.
General inquiries: contact@keeptrip.app.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.summary: This Policy explains what storage and tracking technologies Keeptrip may use while you use the service.

sections.title: 1. What cookies are
paragraphs: Cookies are small files stored on your device that remember your browsing information and enhance your experience.
Similar technologies, like local browser storage, may also be used.

sections.title: 2. Categories used in the MVP
paragraphs: Strictly necessary storage: Allows for authentication, basic session security, and essential operations of the app.
Functional storage: May remember preferences such as language or UI states to improve experience.
PWA technical cache: Used for performance, load availability, and offline operation of the service.

sections.title: 3. Analytics and monitoring (planned)
paragraphs: Keeptrip plans to integrate analytics and error monitoring in future phases of the product.
When such tools are activated, this Policy will be updated to detail the provider, purpose, legal basis, and consent controls as required under GDPR and ePrivacy.

sections.title: 4. Map Services
paragraphs: Keeptrip uses Mapbox rendering services for its interactive maps.
Using map functionalities may imply an exchange of technical connection data with Mapbox to deliver the requested service.

sections.title: 5. Cookie management
paragraphs: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies, although this may affect essential functionalities of Keeptrip.
On supported browsers, you can also delete local storage and site data directly from privacy settings.

sections.title: 6. Legal Basis
paragraphs: For strictly necessary technologies, the legal basis is the legitimate interest of operating a secure and functional service.
For future non-essential technologies, we will enforce prior consent mechanisms as required by applicable laws.

sections.title: 7. Changes to this Policy
paragraphs: We may modify this Policy to reflect technical or legal updates.
The current version will always be accessible with its updated date.

sections.title: 8. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about cookies or privacy, write to privacy@keeptrip.app.

disclaimer.text: This content is provided as an informational and general compliance template. It should be reviewed by a qualified attorney for legal advice specific to your situation.
